• quewuistars1 - Simple and clean theme optimized for dark terminal themes. Includes decorations for the current time, user, directory and git status.

• shuttlestars1 - Written in golang. Has decorators for OS, user, current directory, and the exit code of the last command run.

• simple (rkitover)stars1 - A simple, lightweight, and nice looking prompt that runs quickly even in very slow shells like MSYS2, Cygwin and WSL. It shows decorations for the short name of the current environment (distribution, OS, etc.) the git branch when in a git checkout, as well as the last command exit status (green checkmark for success and red X mark for non-zero exit).
• spaceshipstars17.5k - Theme with git, nvm, rvm/rbenv/chruby, python, ssh and other useful status decorators.

• steef (danihodovic)stars4 - Oh-my-zsh steeef theme as a standalone repository. The purpose behind this repo is avoid having a dependency on oh-my-zsh when using the steeef theme. ZSH plugin managers such as Antibody can use the theme without having to use oh-my-zsh.

• agnoster (fcamblor)stars242 - Solarized Agnoster variant with git status information. Requires a unicode font and works best with a solarizedstars15.3k terminal.
• agnoster (fseguin)stars3 - agnoster variant with a right prompt.

• aritystars0 - A simple theme designed for readability and to give an overview at a glance. Includes path and git decorations.
